[files]

//deDE.lua
LOCALE["deDE"] = {
	--[[
      || Messages
    --]]
	['Level Reached'] = "Levelup! Glückwunsch!",
    ['Pet Level Reached'] = " hat levelup erreicht! Glückwunsch!",
	['Quests Needed'] = " Quests nötig bis Levelup!",
	['Battlegrounds Needed'] = " Schlachtfeld nötig bis Levelup!",
	['Battleground Objectives Needed'] = " Ziel nötig bis Levelup!",
	['Dungeons Needed'] = " Dungeon nötig bis Levelup!",
	['Kills Needed'] = " Kills nötig bis Levelup!",
	['Pet Kills Needed'] = " brauchten für ",
    
    --[[
      || Average Window & LDB Text
    --]]
    ['XP'] = "XP",
	['Kills'] = "Kills",
    ['Kills Short'] = "K",
	['Quests'] = "Quests",
    ['Quests Short'] = "Q",
    ['Dungeons'] = "Dungeons",

	['Pet'] = "Begleiter",

    ['Detach Pet Frame'] = "Loslösen das Begleiter Fenster",
	
	['Lock Avarage Display'] = "Fenster fixiren",

	['Player Kills'] = "Kills",
	['Player Quests'] = "Quests",

    ['Pet Progress'] = "Begleiterfortschritt",
	
	-- Average Data
	['Data Range Header'] = "Reichweite",
    ['Data Range Subheader'] = "Diese setzen, wie viele Artikel erfasst die durchschnittliche Berechnungen verwenden. Je höher Sie diesen desto genauer sie bekommen, aber es dauert sie länger, um auf Veränderungen einz.",
    ["Clear Data Header"] = "Daten löschen",
    ["Clear Data Subheader"] = "Verwenden Sie diese, um die aufgenommenen Daten zu löschen. Beachten Sie, dass dies nicht rückgängig gemacht werden!",
    ['Reset Player Kills'] = "Kills",
    ['Reset Player Quests'] = "Quests",
    ['Reset Battlegrounds'] = "Schlachtfeld",
    ['Reset Dungeons'] = "Dungeons",
    ['Reset Pet Kills'] = "Begleiter",
    ['Reset Player Kill Dialog'] = "Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie löschen möchten der Spieler tötet?",
    ['Reset Player Quest Dialog'] = "Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie löschen möchten der Spieler quests?",
    ['Reset Battleground Dialog'] = "Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie löschen möchten das Schlachtfeld Daten?",
    ['Reset Dungeon Dialog'] = "Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie löschen möchten das Dungeon Daten?",
    ['Reset Pet Kill Dialog'] = "Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie löschen möchten der Begleiter tötet?",
	
	-- LDB Text
    ['LDB Appearence Header'] = "Aussehen",
	['LDB Pattern Header'] = "Text Muster",
    ['LDB Player Data Header'] = "Player-Daten",
	['LDB Pet Data Header'] = "Begleiter-Daten",
    ['LDB Tooltip Header'] = "Tooltip",
	['Show Text'] = "Zeige Text",
	['Show Label'] = "Zeige Label",
	['Show Icon'] = "Zeige Icon",
    ['Show Progress As Bars'] = "Zeige XP Fortschritt als bars",
	['Show XP remaining'] = 'Show XP remaining, rather than gained.',
	['Shorten XP values'] = 'Shorten XP values',
    ['Allow Colored Text'] = "Erlaube Textfarbe",
	['Show Verbose'] = "Ausführlich",
	['Color By XP'] = "XP Fortschrittsfarbe",
	['XP %'] = "XP %",
	['Pet XP %'] = "Pet XP %",
	['LDB Custom Pattern Help'] = "Verfügbare Tags:\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Spieler:|r {kills}, {quests}, {dungeons}, {bgs}, {bgo}, {xp}, {xpnum}, {rested}, {restedp}\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Begleiter:|r {pet}, {petxp}, {petxpnum}\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Innerhalb von Tags können Sie verwenden:|r\n" ..
	"{$label} - Der Kurzname (z. B. 'K' für Kills).\n" ..
	"{$value} - Der berechnete Wert (z. B. '123').\n" ..
	"{$seperator:X} - Ein Trennzeichen, das nur angezeigt wird, wenn es nicht das erste Element ist.\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Styling:|r\n" ..
	"{color=RRGGBB}text{/color} - Wenden Sie eine Hex-Farbe auf Text an.\n" ..
	"{progress}text{/progress} - Wenden Sie die fortschrittsbasierte Farbe an (grün bis rot).\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Beispiel:|r K: {kills}{progress}[{$value}]{/progress}{/kills}",
	
	-- Tooltip
	['Tooltip Sections Header'] = "Sections",
	['Show Player Details'] = "Spieler Details anzeigen",
	['Show Player Experience'] = "Zeige Spieler-Erfahrung",
	['Show Battleground Info'] = "Zeige battlefield info",
    ['Show Dungeon Info'] = "Zeige dungeon info",
	['Show Pet Details'] = "Begleiter Details anzeigen",
    ['Show Timer Details'] = "Show Timer Details",
}

    --[[
      || Messages

	['Quests Needed'] = " flere quests som den for at level op",
	['Battlegrounds Needed'] = " flere kampe som den for at level op",
	['Battleground Objectives Needed'] = " flere mål som den for at level op",
	['Dungeons Needed'] = " flere løbe som den for at level op",
	['Kills Needed'] = " flere for at level op",
	['Pet Kills Needed'] = " for at ",

      || Average Window & LDB Text
    --]]
    ['XP'] = "XP",

    ["Clear Data Subheader"] = "Brug disse til at klare de registrerede data. Bemærk, at denne ikke kan vendes! Brug med forsigtighed.",
    ['Reset Player Kills'] = "Spiller Drab",
    ['Reset Player Quests'] = "Spiller Quests",
    ['Reset Battlegrounds'] = "Battlegrounds",
    ['Reset Dungeons'] = "Dungeons",
    ['Reset Pet Kills'] = "Pet Drab",
    ['Reset Player Kill Dialog'] = "Er du sikker på at du vil slette spillerens drab-optagelser?",
    ['Reset Player Quest Dialog'] = "Er du sikker på at du vil slette spillerens quest-optagelser?",
    ['Reset Battleground Dialog'] = "Er du sikker på at du vil slette battleground-optagelser?",
    ['Reset Dungeon Dialog'] = "Er du sikker på at du vil slette spillerens dungeon-optagelser?",
    ['Reset Pet Kill Dialog'] = "Er du sikker på at du vil slette dit pets' drab-optagelser?",
	
	-- LDB Text
    ['LDB Appearence Header'] = "Appearence",
	['LDB Pattern Header'] = "Tekst Mønster",
    ['LDB Player Data Header'] = "Spiller Data",
	['LDB Pet Data Header'] = "Pet Data",
    ['LDB Tooltip Header'] = "Tooltip",
	['Show Text'] = "Vis Tekst",
	['Show Label'] = "Vis Etiket",
	['Show Icon'] = "Vis Ikon",
    ['Show Progress As Bars'] = "Vis XP fremskridt som barer",
	['Show XP remaining'] = 'Show XP remaining, rather than gained.',
	['Shorten XP values'] = 'Shorten XP values',
	['Allow Colored Text'] = "Tillad farvet tekst",
	['Show Verbose'] = "Verbose",
	['Color By XP'] = "Farve-data af XP-fremskridt",
	['XP %'] = "XP %",
	['Pet XP %'] = "Pet XP %",
	['LDB Custom Pattern Help'] = "Tilgængelige tags:\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Spiller:|r {kills}, {quests}, {dungeons}, {bgs}, {bgo}, {xp}, {xpnum}, {rested}, {restedp}\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Kæledyr:|r {pet}, {petxp}, {petxpnum}\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Inden for tags kan du bruge:|r\n" ..
	"{$label} - Det korte navn (f.eks. 'K' for Kills).\n" ..
	"{$value} - Den beregnede værdi (f.eks. '123').\n" ..
	"{$seperator:X} - En separator, der kun vises, hvis det ikke er det første element.\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Styling:|r\n" ..
	"{color=RRGGBB}tekst{/color} - Anvend en hex-farve på tekst.\n" ..
	"{progress}tekst{/progress} - Anvend den fremskridtsbaserede farve (grøn til rød).\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Eksempel:|r K: {kills}{progress}[{$value}]{/progress}{/kills}",
	
	-- Tooltip
	['Tooltip Sections Header'] = "Sections",
	['Show Player Details'] = "Vis spiller detaljer",
	['Show Player Experience'] = "Vis spiller erfaring",
	['Show Battleground Info'] = "Vis Battleground Info",
    ['Show Dungeon Info'] = "Vis Dungeon Info",
	['Show Pet Details'] = "Vis Pet Detaljer",
    ['Show Timer Details'] = "Vis Timer Info",
}
//enUS.lua
LOCALE["enUS"] = {
    --[[
      || Messages
    --]]
    ['Level Reached'] = "Level reached. Congratulations!",
    ['Pet Level Reached'] = " has reach the next level. Congratulations!",
	['Quests Needed'] = " more quests like that needed to level",
	['Battlegrounds Needed'] = " more battles like that needed to level",
	['Battleground Objectives Needed'] = " more objectives like that needed to level",
	['Dungeons Needed'] = " more runs like that needed to level",
	['Kills Needed'] = " needed to level",
	['Pet Kills Needed'] = " needed for ",

    --[[
      || Average Window & LDB Text
    --]]
    ['XP'] = "XP",
    ['Kills'] = "Kills",
    ['Kills Short'] = "K",
	['Quests'] = "Quests",
    ['Quests Short'] = "Q",
    ['Dungeons'] = "Dungeons",
    ['Dungeons Short'] = "D",
	['Pet'] = "Pet",
    ['Pet Short'] = "P",
    ['Battles'] = "Battles",
    ['Battles Short'] = "B",
	['Battlegrounds'] = "Battlegrounds",
    ['Battlegrounds Short'] = "B",
	['Objectives'] = "Objectives",
	['Objectives Short'] = "O",
	['XP Percent'] = "XP",
	['XP Percent Short'] = "XP",
	['XP Bars'] = "XP",
    ['XP Bars Short'] = "XP",
    ['Pet XP'] = "Pet XP",
    ['Pet XP Short'] = "XP",
    ['Pet Bars'] = "Pet XP",
    ['Pet Bars Short'] = "XP",
    ['Bars'] = "bars",
	['Rested'] = "Rested",
	['Rested Short'] = "R",
	['Timer'] = 'Timer',
	['Timer Short'] = "T",
	["TimeToLevel"] = "TimeToLevel",
    
    --[[
      || Tooltip
    --]]
    ['XToLevel'] = "XToLevel",
    ['Experience'] = "Experience",
    ['Pet Experience'] = "Pet Experience",
	['XP Progress'] = "progress",
	['XP Bars Remaining'] = "bars remaining",
	['XP Rested'] = "rested",
	['Quest XP Required'] = "quest XP needed",
	['Kill XP Required'] = "kill XP needed",
    ['Battlegrounds Required'] = "Battlegrounds Required",
	['Current Battleground'] = "Current Battleground",
	['Last Battleground'] = "Last Battleground",
	['Dungeons Required'] = "Dungeons Required",
	['Current Dungeon'] = "Current Dungeon",
	['Last Dungeon'] = "Last Dungeon",
	['No Dungeons Completed'] = "No data",
	['Name'] = "Name",
	['Total XP'] = "Total XP",
    ['Total Rested'] = "Total Rested",
	['NPC Kills'] = "NPC Kills",
	['No Battles Fought'] = "No data",
    ['Click To Configure'] = "Click to configure",
	['Right Click To Configure'] = "Right click to configure",
	['Average'] = "Average",
	['Max'] = "Max",
	['Min'] = "Min",
	['Kills to level'] = "Kills to level",
	
	["Updating..."] = "Updating...",
	["Session"] = "Session",
	["Level"] = "Level",
	["Mode"] = "Data",
	["Time to level"] = "Time to level",
	["Time elapsed"] = "Time elapsed",
	["XP per hour"] = "XP/hr",
	["XP Needed"] = "XP Needed",
	
	["No Kills Recorded"] = "No kills recorded this session. Using level data instead. Go kill something!",
	
	--[[
	  || Configuration 
	--]]
    ['General Tab'] = 'General',
    ['Messages Tab'] = 'Messages',
    ['Window Tab'] = 'Window',
    ['Data Tab'] = 'Data',
    ['LDB Tab'] = 'LDB',
    
    ['MainDescription'] = 'A simple addon that provides details about the kills, quests, dungeons, battles and experience required to gain a level.',
    ['Version'] = "Version",
    ['Author'] = "Author",
    ['Email'] = "Email",
    ['Website'] = "Website",
    ['Category'] = "Category",
    ['License'] = "License",
    ['All Rights Reserved'] = "All rights reserved.",

    ["This option becomes available at level 15"] = "This option becomes available at level 15.",

	['LocaleHeader'] = "Locale",
	['Debug'] = "Debug",

    ['Close'] = "Close",
    ['Config Language Reload Prompt'] = "The locale will not be updated until the UI is reloaded. Do you want to reload now?",
    ['Yes'] = 'Yes',
    ['No'] = 'No',

    ['Enable'] = "Enable",

    ['Messages'] = "Messages",

	['Show Progress As Bars'] = "Show XP progress as bars",
	['Show XP remaining'] = 'Show XP remaining, rather than gained.',
	['Shorten XP values'] = 'Shorten XP values',
	['Allow Colored Text'] = "Allow Colored Text",
	['Show Verbose'] = "Use verbose text",
	['Color By XP'] = "Color data by XP progress",
	['XP %'] = "XP %",
	['Pet XP %'] = "Pet XP %",
	['LDB Custom Pattern Help'] = "Available Tags:\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Player:|r {kills}, {quests}, {dungeons}, {bgs}, {bgo}, {xp}, {xpnum}, {rested}, {restedp}\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Pet:|r {pet}, {petxp}, {petxpnum}\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Within tags you can use:|r\n" ..
	"{$label} - The short name (e.g. 'K' for Kills).\n" ..
	"{$value} - The calculated value (e.g. '123').\n" ..
	"{$seperator:X} - A separator shown only if it's not the first element.\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Styling:|r\n" ..
	"{color=RRGGBB}text{/color} - Apply a hex color to text.\n" ..
	"{progress}text{/progress} - Apply the progress-based color (green to red).\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Example:|r K: {kills}{progress}[{$value}]{/progress}{/kills}",
	
	-- Tooltip
	['Tooltip Sections Header'] = "Sections",
	['Show Player Details'] = "Show Player Details",
	['Show Player Experience'] = "Show Player Experience",
	['Show Battleground Info'] = "Show Battleground Info",
    ['Show Dungeon Info'] = "Show Dungeon Info",
	['Show Pet Details'] = "Show Pet Details",
    ['Show Timer Details'] = "Show Timer Details",
}

    ['Reset Player Kill Dialog'] = "Êtes-vous sûr vous voulez-vous supprimer toutes les données de mob?",
    ['Reset Player Quest Dialog'] = "Êtes-vous sûr vous voulez-vous supprimer toutes les données de quest?",
    ['Reset Battleground Dialog'] = "Êtes-vous sûr vous voulez-vous supprimer toutes les données de bataille?",
    ['Reset Dungeon Dialog'] = "Êtes-vous sûr vous voulez-vous supprimer toutes les données de donjon?",
    ['Reset Pet Kill Dialog'] = "Êtes-vous sûr vous voulez-vous supprimer toutes les données de familier?",
	
	-- LDB Text
    ['LDB Appearence Header'] = "Aspect",
	['LDB Pattern Header'] = "Text Muster",
    ['LDB Player Data Header'] = "Données de joueur",
	['LDB Pet Data Header'] = "Données de familier",
    ['LDB Tooltip Header'] = "Tooltip",
	['Show Text'] = "Montrer la texte",
	['Show Label'] = "Montrer la libellé",
	['Show Icon'] = "Montrer le icône",
    ['Show Progress As Bars'] = "Montrer XP progrès que les bars",
	['Show XP remaining'] = 'Show XP remaining, rather than gained.',
	['Shorten XP values'] = 'Shorten XP values',
	['Allow Colored Text'] = "Autoriser la coloration du texte",
	['Show Verbose'] = "Verbeux",
	['Color By XP'] = "Couleur par XP progrès",
	['XP %'] = "XP %",
	['Pet XP %'] = "Familier XP %",
	['LDB Custom Pattern Help'] = "Balises disponibles:\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Joueur:|r {kills}, {quests}, {dungeons}, {bgs}, {bgo}, {xp}, {xpnum}, {rested}, {restedp}\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Familier:|r {pet}, {petxp}, {petxpnum}\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Dans les balises, vous pouvez utiliser:|r\n" ..
	"{$label} - Le nom court (par ex. 'M' pour Mobs).\n" ..
	"{$value} - La valeur calculée (par ex. '123').\n" ..
	"{$seperator:X} - Un séparateur affiché uniquement s'il ne s'agit pas du premier élément.\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Style:|r\n" ..
	"{color=RRGGBB}texte{/color} - Appliquer une couleur hexadécimale au texte.\n" ..
	"{progress}texte{/progress} - Appliquer la couleur basée sur la progression (du vert au rouge).\n\n" ..
	"|cFFFFD100Exemple:|r M: {kills}{progress}[{$value}]{/progress}{/kills}",
	
	-- Tooltip
	['Tooltip Sections Header'] = "Sections",
	['Show Player Details'] = "Montrer les détails de joueur",
	['Show Player Experience'] = "Montrer les expérience de joueur",
	['Show Battleground Info'] = "Montrer information de bataille",
    ['Show Dungeon Info'] = "Montrer information de donjon",
	['Show Pet Details'] = "Montrer les détails de familier",
    ['Show Timer Details'] = "Show Timer Details",
}
